name: Go Kernel
objective: Provide an executable forjad daemon and forja CLI with canonical contract validation and a deterministic in-memory state machine.
scope: Go 1.26.5 module and executable daemon and CLI
typed run IDs, deterministic clocks, stable errors, and optimistic FSM
structured secret-redacted logging and graceful shutdown
unit, race, fuzz, contract, smoke, and reproducible build gates
author: codex
independent_validator: GitHub Actions and isolated Codex CLI review
